message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called graffiti
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 5 people at 17:30 on thursday
If the booking fails how about 16:30
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the east and should be in the expensive price range
The hotel should include free wifi and should have a star of 2
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 3 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
